fragments.summary: Use direct Dolt reads for high-frequency viewer polling.
fragments.full_text: Use direct Dolt reads for high-frequency viewer polling. Prefer direct reads when task is specifically about retrieval path choice.

fragments.summary: Serve cached snapshot for viewer polling loops.
fragments.full_text: Serve cached snapshot for viewer polling loops. Cached snapshots help responsiveness when freshness tradeoff is acceptable.

fragments.summary: Show current packet separately from total memory.
fragments.full_text: Show current packet separately from total memory. Separation matters when user asks what is active now versus what exists overall.
Favor density over presentation chrome. Dense UI can help inspection, but this does not decide packet/store boundaries.

fragments.summary: Canonical design lives in schema and plan docs.
fragments.full_text: Canonical design lives in schema and plan docs. This fragment tells you where truth lives.

fragments.summary: Start implementation audits from docs before tests.
fragments.full_text: Start implementation audits from docs before tests. This is more specific than simply naming canonical docs.

fragments.summary: Require exhaustive fragment feedback before edits.
fragments.full_text: Require exhaustive fragment feedback before edits. This is stricter than generic review feedback.

fragments.summary: Capture general review feedback before changes.
fragments.full_text: Capture general review feedback before changes. This is weaker and more generic than fragment-level verdict coverage.

fragments.summary: Expose live, stale, and error states explicitly.
fragments.full_text: Expose live, stale, and error states explicitly. Freshness visibility matters during inspection.

fragments.summary: Surface open questions before long actions.
fragments.full_text: Surface open questions before long actions. Explicit uncertainty can stop premature expensive work.
